articles.title: Samsung is discontinuing its texting app, tells impacted users to switch to Google Messages - AP News
articles.description: Samsung is saying goodbye its namesake texting app. According to an end of service announcement published on the tech giant’s U.S. support website, Samsung Messages will be discontinued in July. Impacted owners of Samsung smartphones and other gadgets are bei…
articles.content:
NEW YORK (AP) Samsung is saying goodbye its namesake texting app.
According to an end of service announcement published on the tech giants U.S. support website, Samsung Messages will be discontinued… [+1717 chars]
